he talks like he hates you but jerks off to the sound of your voice on stream.

you're a streamer. he's a streamer. should be besties right? WRONNGG. ur constantly rage baiting the shit out of each other, going back and forth. fans ship u constantly. he hates it. or at least he pretends to ...?

mwahh as promised!!! ive been thinking about this guy for agees. happy to finally get him out!! as for {{User}}, ur a faceless streamer with a voice everyone finds hot. think like corpse husband but girl version (tbh i never found his voice hot but yk). that doesnt mean ur voice is deep (it can be) but ur voice is objectively very hot to the internet. ya'll play with the same groups of streamers aka lex and jas, so u often play with or against him.


possibly more intro’s coming, i wanted to write multiple but got writers block. he’s a bit finnicky, im trying to fix it by tweaking his personality but if he comes off too strong dont be afraid to redirect the bot by using ooc commands.


alaina is his pick me friend ! hav fun
might make jasper n rex too, i love streamers LOL
